items.name: button
items.title: Button
items.description: Pill button — variants stripped to what I actually use. Loading + dark mode baked in.

items.name: badge
items.title: Badge
items.description: Pill badge — default, secondary, outline, destructive. Token-driven, dark mode safe.

items.name: tooltip
items.title: Tooltip
items.description: Hover hint — single-component wrapper around base-ui's compound API. Pass content + a child element, done.

items.name: copy-button
items.title: Copy Button
items.description: Icon button for clipboard copy actions. Small, async-safe, and built on the registry Button.

items.name: copy-command
items.title: Copy Command
items.description: Token-driven command row with monospace text and a clipboard action. Use for shell snippets and install commands.

items.name: segmented-control
items.title: Segmented Control
items.description: Compact one-of-many control for modes, locales, and small view switches. Token-driven and keyboard-focusable.

items.name: table
items.title: Table
items.description: Small data table primitive with token dividers and a block background container.

items.name: corner
items.title: Corner
items.description: Layout primitive — pin children to a viewport corner (top-left, top-right, bottom-left, bottom-right).

items.name: surface
items.title: Surface
items.description: Layout primitive — soft block surface using bg-block, token radius, and no border.

items.name: container
items.title: Container
items.description: Layout primitive — centered responsive page width with shared horizontal padding.
